title: Karpatiosorbus magocsyana
taxonomy: Karpatiosorbus magocsyana is classified as a species within the family Rosaceae. This deciduous shrub or small tree is native to the Carpathian Mountains in Eastern Europe. The species is a part of the genus Karpatiosorbus, which is closely related to the genus Sorbus. Karpatiosorbus magocsyana is often placed within the subgenus Achnersorbus. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation and oxidative stress, due to its potential health benefits in reducing pain and improving cardiovascular health.
